# Kayak

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::Kayak;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        Kayak { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```

## Tags
kayak, boat, paddle, water, sport, recreation, adventure, outdoors, equipment, lake, ocean

## Categories
transportation
